targetRoutes.purpose: Verify the implemented prompt editor in its actual settings page context.
targetRoutes.authState: authenticated team admin, if the app requires auth
targetRoutes.dataState: existing saved prompt or explicitly marked placeholder

states.name: default
states.expected: Editor is primary, templates and preview are secondary, placeholder content is labeled if used.

states.name: error
states.setup: Trigger validation with prompt content below the app's minimum valid threshold.
states.expected: Error appears near editor, remains accessible, and does not shift the whole layout unexpectedly.

states.name: success
states.setup: Save a valid prompt using existing app behavior.
states.expected: Saved state confirms scope without inventing downstream side effects.

interactions.name: keyboard-path
interactions.expected: Focus-visible is clear and every visible action is reachable.

interactions.name: long-text
interactions.expected: Text does not overflow parent controls or occlude adjacent content.

referenceScreenshots.description: Reference for explicit error state treatment

checks.description: Implementation follows selected B+A+C decision and preserve/change/avoid lists.
Font family, weight, size, line-height, fallback, wrapping, and truncation match DESIGN.md or project tokens.
Editor, rail, preview, actions, and status spacing match selected density without overlap.
Colors map to DESIGN.md or project tokens, with no drifted state color or low contrast.
No invented data, lorem, filler copy, or fake controls.
Validate/save, focus-visible, long text, error, success, and mobile interactions work.
No rounded-card plus colored-left-border emphasis, decorative blobs, placeholder imagery, or repeated icon card grid.

blockers: Cannot open /settings or equivalent component preview.
Cannot capture visual evidence for target surface.
Current implementation target does not match confirmed surface.

detect.notes: Use node vendor/impeccable/cli/bin/cli.js detect when dependencies and Node version are available.

critique.notes: Enable when an additional design review is needed; critique is not a replacement for contract QA.
